calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-17-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Eric R. Fleming, Clerk: A. Mok. Reporter: Ann Mendoza, CSR#6812.

John P. Zanghi, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Swords to
Plowshares.
Witness Julie Ann Frazier-Merritt sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Timothy Reeve.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 250 Kearny Street 315, San Francisco, California 94108, San Francisco County.

Damages $1812
Holdover damages $724.80
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $315.00
For a Total Judgment of $2851.80

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-17-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Lowell Haky, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported.

Appearances:
Plaintiff Swords to Plowshares is present, represented by Jeremy Bradley.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joseph Grant is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of September 17, 2018 remains on calendar.
